title: RA: Fabric Madness
description: A Random Assortment of fabric mods
body:
**This modpack is the third in a series called "Random Assortment" where you can probably guess, there will be a pretty random assortment of mods with a specific theme.**

**A few of the features in this:**
1. New Bosses! ([AdventureZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/adventurez))
2. [BetterEnd](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend) and [BetterNether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether) make the End and Nether look nicer, but they also add many other new things.
3. [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) for performance, [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) for shaders, and other mods like those!
4. An item list like JEI ([EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi))
5. And many, many more. You can play to find out what!

Note: This modpack might be laggy on some PCs, if needed you can add more optimization mods.

**If you want a full mod list, I will post it here later once it is finalized. For now you can just look at the modpack's dependencies. You can find the dependencies if you click on the most recent version of the modpack.**
